001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import java.time.LocalDate;
004
005/**
006 * Data transfer object containing summary information for a batch card display.
007 */
008public class BatchCardSummary {
009
010  private final long batchId;
011  private final Integer batchNumber;
012  private final String incubatorName;
013  private final String breedSummary;
014  private final int viableCount;
015  private final int totalEggCount;
016  private final double viabilityRate;
017  private final LocalDate expectedHatchDate;
018  private final String nextMilestoneLabel;
019  private final LocalDate nextMilestoneDate;
020
021  /**
022   * Constructs a BatchCardSummary with all required information.
023   *
024   * @param batchId the unique identifier for the batch
025   * @param batchNumber the batch reference number
026   * @param incubatorName the name of the incubator for this batch
027   * @param breedSummary a summary of the breeds in this batch
028   * @param viableCount the count of viable eggs
029   * @param totalEggCount the total count of eggs in the batch
030   * @param viabilityRate the calculated viability rate (0.0 to 1.0)
031   * @param expectedHatchDate the expected hatch date
032   * @param nextMilestoneLabel the label for the next milestone
033   * @param nextMilestoneDate the date of the next milestone
034   */
035  public BatchCardSummary(
036      long batchId,
037      Integer batchNumber,
038      String incubatorName,
039      String breedSummary,
040      int viableCount,
041      int totalEggCount,
042      double viabilityRate,
043      LocalDate expectedHatchDate,
044      String nextMilestoneLabel,
045      LocalDate nextMilestoneDate
046  ) {
047    this.batchId = batchId;
048    this.batchNumber = batchNumber;
049    this.incubatorName = incubatorName;
050    this.breedSummary = breedSummary;
051    this.viableCount = viableCount;
052    this.totalEggCount = totalEggCount;
053    this.viabilityRate = viabilityRate;
054    this.expectedHatchDate = expectedHatchDate;
055    this.nextMilestoneLabel = nextMilestoneLabel;
056    this.nextMilestoneDate = nextMilestoneDate;
057  }
058
059  /**
060   * Gets the unique identifier for the batch.
061   *
062   * @return the batch ID
063   */
064  public long getBatchId() {
065    return batchId;
066  }
067
068  /**
069   * Gets the batch reference number.
070   *
071   * @return the batch number, or null if not assigned
072   */
073  public Integer getBatchNumber() {
074    return batchNumber;
075  }
076
077  /**
078   * Gets the name of the incubator for this batch.
079   *
080   * @return the incubator name
081   */
082  public String getIncubatorName() {
083    return incubatorName;
084  }
085
086  /**
087   * Gets the breed summary for this batch.
088   *
089   * @return the breed summary
090   */
091  public String getBreedSummary() {
092    return breedSummary;
093  }
094
095  /**
096   * Gets the count of viable eggs in this batch.
097   *
098   * @return the viable egg count
099   */
100  public int getViableCount() {
101    return viableCount;
102  }
103
104  /**
105   * Gets the total count of eggs in this batch.
106   *
107   * @return the total egg count
108   */
109  public int getTotalEggCount() {
110    return totalEggCount;
111  }
112
113  /**
114   * Gets the viability rate of this batch.
115   *
116   * @return the viability rate as a decimal (0.0 to 1.0)
117   */
118  public double getViabilityRate() {
119    return viabilityRate;
120  }
121
122  /**
123   * Gets the expected hatch date for this batch.
124   *
125   * @return the expected hatch date
126   */
127  public LocalDate getExpectedHatchDate() {
128    return expectedHatchDate;
129  }
130
131  /**
132   * Gets the label for the next milestone event.
133   *
134   * @return the next milestone label
135   */
136  public String getNextMilestoneLabel() {
137    return nextMilestoneLabel;
138  }
139
140  /**
141   * Gets the date of the next milestone event.
142   *
143   * @return the next milestone date
144   */
145  public LocalDate getNextMilestoneDate() {
146    return nextMilestoneDate;
147  }
148}
